description: PostgreSQL 14+ best practices: MVCC and vacuum reality, rich types (timestamptz, jsonb, uuid), index arsenal (partial, expression, GIN, BRIN, CONCURRENTLY), lock-aware migrations, ON CONFLICT/RETURNING, version leverage through 17/18.

interface.longDescription:
PostgreSQL 14+ best practices: MVCC/vacuum reality, timestamptz/jsonb/uuid types, partial/expression/GIN/BRIN indexes, lock-aware migrations, ON CONFLICT/RETURNING, version leverage through 17/18. Includes /postgresql:review.

Codex fidelity: 1 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s).

name: postgresql
